content.text: I’ll inspect the WKT parsing and sinusoidal projection code paths to see how the CRS is interpreted differently from the proj4 string.
I’ll inspect the WKT parsing and projection initialization paths to see how the custom spheroid is represented.

1	{
2	  "name": "proj4",
3	  "version": "2.20.5-alpha",
4	  "description": "Proj4js is a JavaScript library to transform point coordinates from one coordinate system to another, including datum transformations.",
5	  "homepage": "https://proj4js.github.io/proj4js/",
6	  "main": "dist/proj4-src.js",
7	  "module": "lib/index.js",
8	  "types": "dist/index.d.ts",
9	  "funding": "https://github.com/sponsors/ahocevar",
10	  "scripts": {
11	    "prepare": "npm run test",
12	    "build": "grunt && npm run rollup",
13	    "build:tmerc": "grunt build:tmerc && npm run rollup",
14	    "rollup": "rollup -c",
15	    "pretest": "npm run lint && npm run types",
16	    "lint": "eslint *.js *.mjs scripts lib test",
17	    "format": "npm run lint -- --fix",
18	    "test": "npm run build && npm run test:all",
19	    "test:coverage": "nyc npm run test:ci",
20	    "test:all": "npm run test:ci && npm run test:browser",

file.content:
{
  "name": "proj4",
  "version": "2.20.5-alpha",
  "description": "Proj4js is a JavaScript library to transform point coordinates from one coordinate system to another, including datum transformations.",
  "homepage": "https://proj4js.github.io/proj4js/",
  "main": "dist/proj4-src.js",
  "module": "lib/index.js",
  "types": "dist/index.d.ts",
  "funding": "https://github.com/sponsors/ahocevar",
  "scripts": {
    "prepare": "npm run test",
    "build": "grunt && npm run rollup",
    "build:tmerc": "grunt build:tmerc && npm run rollup",
    "rollup": "rollup -c",
    "pretest": "npm run lint && npm run types",
    "lint": "eslint *.js *.mjs scripts lib test",
    "format": "npm run lint -- --fix",
    "test": "npm run build && npm run test:all",
    "test:coverage": "nyc npm run test:ci",
    "test:all": "npm run test:ci && npm run test:browser",
    "test:browser": "node test/puppeteer-tests.mjs",
    "test:ci": "npx -y mocha test/test-ci.mjs --reporter dot",
    "types": "tsc"
  },
  "repository": {
    "type": "git",
    "url": "git://github.com/proj4js/proj4js.git"
  },
  "author": "",
  "license": "MIT",
  "devDependencies": {

input.command: npm run lint && npm run types && npx -y mocha test/test-ci.mjs --reporter dot
input.description: Run lint, types, and node tests

content.content:
M lib/Proj.js
 M lib/projections/sinu.js
?? reports/

content.text:
Implemented the fix without committing.

What changed:
- `lib/projections/sinu.js`
  - Initializes Sinusoidal defaults for `x0`, `y0`, and `long0`.
  - Uses WKT parser’s `longc` value as a fallback for `long0`, fixing the `longitude_of_center` WKT case that previously produced `NaN`.

- `lib/Proj.js`
  - Treats WKT datums beginning with `"Not specified"` as `datum=none`.
  - This matches the behavior of the equivalent PROJ string with `+R=... +no_defs`, avoiding an unintended datum transformation from the custom sphere to WGS84 ellipsoid.

Validation performed:
- Reproduced the failing MODIS Sinusoidal WKT transformation.
- Confirmed the result is now:

```js
[-104.43258313171073, 39.99999999641088]
```

- Ran:

```sh
npm run build
npm run lint
npm run types
npx -y mocha test/test-ci.mjs --reporter dot
```

Result:
- `3989 passing`
- Lint and TypeScript checks passed.

No persistent regression test files were added, so there were no written test cases to delete.

result:
Implemented the fix without committing.

What changed:
- `lib/projections/sinu.js`
  - Initializes Sinusoidal defaults for `x0`, `y0`, and `long0`.
  - Uses WKT parser’s `longc` value as a fallback for `long0`, fixing the `longitude_of_center` WKT case that previously produced `NaN`.

- `lib/Proj.js`
  - Treats WKT datums beginning with `"Not specified"` as `datum=none`.
  - This matches the behavior of the equivalent PROJ string with `+R=... +no_defs`, avoiding an unintended datum transformation from the custom sphere to WGS84 ellipsoid.

Validation performed:
- Reproduced the failing MODIS Sinusoidal WKT transformation.
- Confirmed the result is now:

```js
[-104.43258313171073, 39.99999999641088]
```

- Ran:

```sh
npm run build
npm run lint
npm run types
npx -y mocha test/test-ci.mjs --reporter dot
```

Result:
- `3989 passing`
- Lint and TypeScript checks passed.

No persistent regression test files were added, so there were no written test cases to delete.
